emotional.priority: Highest (always trumps all other authorities when defined)
emotional.description: The Emotional Solar Plexus Authority is the most common authority in the Energy Blueprint system (~50% of humanity). If your Solar Plexus is defined, this IS your authority — no exceptions. Your emotional wave must complete its full cycle before clarity emerges. You are not designed for spontaneous, in-the-moment decisions. Instead, you need time to feel through the complete spectrum of emotional responses (high, low, and neutral) before your truth reveals itself. Clarity comes from the pattern across states, not from any single feeling.
emotional.howItWorks: Your emotions move in waves — highs, lows, and the calm in between. When faced with a decision, notice how you feel about it across multiple points in your emotional cycle. What feels consistently true across the highs and lows? That's your clarity. Never decide when you're emotionally amplified (high) or crashed (low). Wait for the calm perspective that naturally emerges after you've felt the full range.
emotional.strategy: Sleep on it. For small decisions, wait at least overnight. For major life decisions, wait a full week or more. Give yourself permission to say 'I need time to feel into this.' The phrase that serves Emotional Authority is: 'There is no truth in the now.' Your truth unfolds over time.
emotional.signatureWhen Correct: Deep emotional clarity, decisions that feel unshakably right across all emotional states
emotional.notSelfWhen Incorrect: Regret, impulsive choices made from emotional highs or lows, commitments that feel wrong later
emotional.primeInsight: Emotional Authority is not about 'waiting until you feel good.' It's about waiting until you've felt *everything* — and then noticing what remains consistent. The emotional wave is your decision-making instrument, not an obstacle to overcome. In Prime Self, mastering your wave transforms decision-making from impulsive reactivity into profound emotional intelligence.

sacral.priority: Second (only if Solar Plexus is undefined)
sacral.centers: Requires defined Sacral center AND undefined Solar Plexus
sacral.description: Sacral Authority is the gut-level, in-the-moment 'uh-huh' or 'un-un' response. It's not a thought or a feeling — it's a sound, a motor response from the defined Sacral center. Generators and Manifesting Generators with undefined Solar Plexus operate from this authority. Your Sacral responds to YES/NO questions in real-time with an immediate knowing. The response is physical, visceral, and binary: a full-body yes or a contracting no.
sacral.howItWorks: Ask your Sacral YES/NO questions and listen to the sound it makes. The Sacral literally makes noises: 'uh-huh' (yes), 'un-un' (no), or silence/hesitation (not yet). This isn't mental — you're listening to your body's motor response. The Sacral only speaks in the present moment when it's directly asked or when life presents a clear choice. It doesn't initiate; it responds.
sacral.strategy: Wait for life to bring you options, then notice your gut response. If someone asks 'Want to go to dinner?' listen for the immediate sound your Sacral makes before your mind jumps in. Practice having others ask you YES/NO questions so you can hear your own response. Trust the first sound; doubt comes from the mind afterward.
sacral.signatureWhenCorrect: Satisfaction, sustained energy for things your Sacral says yes to, deep fulfillment in your work and commitments
sacral.notSelfWhenIncorrect: Frustration, being stuck in commitments your Sacral said no to, exhaustion from doing things that aren't correct for you
sacral.primeInsight: Sacral Authority is immediate, not intellectual. In Prime Self, learning to trust the Sacral's  binary response liberates Generators from mental confusion. The mind is a terrible authority for Sacral beings — it will create elaborate justifications for whatever it wants. But the Sacral knows instantly and doesn't lie. Your work is to cultivate environments where you can respond authentically, and to trust the gut even when the mind disagrees.

splenic.priority: Third (only if Solar Plexus AND Sacral are undefined)
splenic.centers: Requires defined Spleen center with undefined Solar Plexus and Sacral
splenic.description: Splenic Authority is the quietest, most subtle authority — a whisper of intuitive knowing in the present moment. The Spleen speaks once, softly, and will not repeat itself. This authority is for Projectors and some Manifestors with specific chart configurations. The Splenic voice is spontaneous, instinctive, and often defies logic. It's the gut-feeling that says 'leave now' or 'trust this person' without explanation.
splenic.howItWorks: The Spleen communicates through quiet, spontaneous impulses — often felt in the body as a subtle pull toward or away from something. It might whisper 'yes' when nothing logical supports it, or 'leave' when everything seems fine. The key is that it speaks ONCE. If you miss it, it won't repeat. The Splenic hit is immediate, undeniable, and gone in a flash. Doubt means you missed it.
splenic.strategy: Cultivate profound present-moment awareness. The Splenic whisper happens in the NOW — not when you're lost in thought about the past or future. Practice tuning into body sensations and subtle pulls. When you get a splenic hit, act on it immediately. The mind will want to analyze; by then, the moment has passed.
splenic.signatureWhenCorrect: Health, vitality, being in the right place at the right time (survival luck), spontaneous well-being
splenic.notSelfWhenIncorrect: Illness, poor timing, second-guessing instincts, mental override leading to wrong situations
splenic.primeInsight: Splenic Authority is survival intelligence operating at quantum speed. In Prime Self, those with Splenic Authority are learning to trust the body's knowing over the mind's reasoning. The Spleen doesn't explain itself — it simply knows. This is the authority of shamans, healers, and those whose role requires spontaneous, intuitive navigation. Your challenge is silencing mental chatter long enough to hear the whisper.

ego_manifested.centers: Requires defined Heart (Ego) center connected to Throat, undefined Solar Plexus, undefined Sacral, undefined Spleen (Manifestor only)
ego_manifested.waitingTime: Wait for the heart's 'I want' to arise naturally
ego_manifested.description: Ego Manifested Authority comes from the Heart (Ego/Will) center directly connected to the Throat. This is an extremely rare authority, found only in Manifestors with a very specific chart configuration. The authority operates through what the Heart genuinely wants — not what the mind thinks it should want, but what the Will truly desires. When the Heart says 'I will do this,' that statement itself creates the authority to act.
ego_manifested.howItWorks: Wait for your Heart to declare what it wants. The Will speak in 'I' statements: 'I will,' 'I want,' 'I'm going to.' This isn't mental desire or emotional longing — it's a deep willpower statement from the Ego. When your Heart makes a promise to yourself, that becomes your commitment. Your word to yourself (not to others) is your bond.
ego_manifested.strategy: Don't make decisions from your head or to please others. Wait until your Heart speaks its truth: 'I want this.' Then inform others of your decision (Manifestor strategy) and act. The Ego's word is law — for you. Make commitments your Will can genuinely sustain, not what your mind thinks you 'should' do.
ego_manifested.signatureWhenCorrect: Peace, authentic self-expression, sustainable willpower, promises kept to yourself
ego_manifested.notSelfWhenIncorrect: Anger (Manifestor not-self), overcommitment, broken promises, will exhausted by obligations the Heart never wanted
ego_manifested.primeInsight: Ego Manifested Authority is about self-directed will. In Prime Self, this rare configuration creates leaders who can commit to long-term visions based entirely on internal willpower. But the trap is agreeing to things the mind thinks are 'good ideas' that the Heart doesn't actually want. Your work is distinguishing true Will from mental strategy. When your Heart speaks, it's binding — to yourself. Everything else is negotiable.

ego_projected.centers: Requires defined Heart (Ego) center NOT connected to Throat, undefined Solar Plexus, undefined Sacral (Projector only)
ego_projected.waitingTime: Wait for invitation, then notice what the Heart says
ego_projected.description: Ego Projected Authority is exclusive to Projectors with a defined Heart center that is NOT connected to the Throat. Unlike Ego Manifested (where theWill speaks directly through the Throat), Ego Projected Authority must wait for the invitation (Projector strategy) and THEN check what the Heart truly wants. The invitation creates the container; the Heart provides the answer.
ego_projected.howItWorks: First, wait for recognition and invitation (Projector strategy). Once invited, tune into your Heart: Does your Will genuinely want this? Is this something you can commit to with full willpower? The Heart's response will be a yes or no about whether this invitation is worthy of your energy investment. Don't say yes to invitations just because they came — check if your Heart wants them.
ego_projected.strategy: Practice the double-filter: (1) Is this a genuine invitation/recognition? (2) Does my Heart actually want it? Both must be true. Your Ego will tell you when an invitation is worth your will and when it's not. Trust the Heart's wisdom about sustainable commitment.
ego_projected.signatureWhenCorrect: Success (Projector signature), sustainable commitments, deep satisfaction with chosen invitations
ego_projected.notSelfWhenIncorrect: Bitterness (Projector not-self), exhausted will from accepting invitations the Heart didn't want, resentment toward 'opportunities' that drain you
ego_projected.primeInsight: Ego Projected Authority combines Projector strategy (wait for invitation) with Heart wisdom (choose what you genuinely want). In Prime Self, this creates selective mastery — you become extraordinary at what your Heart commits to because you're not diluting your will across obligations you never wanted. Your power is in your selectivity.

self_projected.centers: Requires defined G (Self) center connected to Throat, undefined Solar Plexus, undefined Sacral, undefined Spleen, undefined Heart (Projector only)
self_projected.waitingTime: Talk it through; listen to yourself
self_projected.description: Self Projected Authority is unique to Projectors with a specific configuration: G center connected to Throat. The authority comes from hearing yourself talk. You discover what's true by speaking out loud and listening to your own voice. The G center (identity/direction) speaks through the Throat, but you can only access this wisdom by externalizing it. This authority REQUIRES conversation, dialogue, or speaking aloud.
self_projected.howItWorks: Talk about the decision with someone you trust — not to get their advice, but to hear yourself. As you speak, pay attention to your own voice: Does it sound certain or uncertain? Committed or hesitant? Your truth reveals itself in the sound of your own expression. You're literally 'projecting' your Self (G center) through your voice and listening for your own authority.
self_projected.strategy: Find trusted sounding boards — people who can listen without giving advice or opinions. Explain the decision, describe your options, talk through your feelings. Listen to how you sound. When you hear yourself say something with unmistakable certainty, that's your truth. Journaling aloud, voice memos, or talking to pets can also work.
self_projected.signatureWhenCorrect: Success (Projector signature), clear sense of direction and identity, decisions that align with who you are
self_projected.notSelfWhenIncorrect: Bitterness, confusion about identity and direction, decisions made in silence without self-reflection
self_projected.primeInsight: Self Projected Authority is the most paradoxical: you can't know until you hear yourself speak. In Prime Self, this creates natural counselors, coaches, and guides who discover their own wisdom in the act of articulating it. Your process is dialogical — you need to externalize to internalize. The trap is making decisions in isolation without speaking them aloud.

mental_projector.centers: Requires ALL motor and awareness centers undefined (only Head and Ajna defined, or only some non-motor/awareness centers defined)
mental_projector.waitingTime: Days, weeks, or full lunar cycle; requires external sounding boards
mental_projector.description: Mental Projector (Outer Authority) is the rarest authority configuration. With no motor or internal awareness centers to generate consistent decision-making energy, these individuals must use their ENVIRONMENT and TRUSTED OTHERS as their authority. They need to talk through decisions with multiple people over time, gathering reflections like a Reflector gathers lunar data. The pattern that emerges from these conversations reveals the truth.
mental_projector.howItWorks: Mental Projectors cannot make decisions in isolation. They must engage trusted advisors, friends, mentors — people who know them well and can reflect back patterns. The Projector talks, the others reflect, and over time (sometimes days, sometimes weeks), a clarity emerges from the collected perspectives. This is not about consensus; it's about using others as mirrors to see yourself and your situation clearly.
mental_projector.strategy: Build a council of trusted advisors. When facing a decision, talk it through with multiple people over several conversations. Pay attention to what gets reflected back to you consistently. Notice patterns in how different people respond. Your authority is in the pattern of external reflections, integrated over time. For major decisions, consider waiting a full lunar cycle (28 days) like Reflectors.
mental_projector.signatureWhenCorrect: Success, profound clarity from synthesis of external input, wise decision-making through collaboration
mental_projector.notSelfWhenIncorrect: Mental confusion, decision paralysis, seeking advice from the wrong people, bitterness from making choices in isolation
mental_projector.primeInsight: Mental Projector Outer Authority is human design's most collaborative decision-making process. In Prime Self, these rare individuals teach us that wisdom doesn't always come from within — sometimes it emerges from the wisdom of trusted community. Your power is in curating the RIGHT advisors and giving yourself TIME to synthesize their reflections. You are designed to make wise decisions through council, not solitary contemplation.

lunar_cycle.description: Lunar Cycle Authority is exclusive to Reflectors, who have no defined centers at all. With nothing fixed in their design, Reflectors must wait a full 28-day lunar cycle before making major decisions. During this cycle, the Moon transits through all 64 gates of the Energy Chart, activating every possible energy configuration. By the end of the cycle, the Reflector has 'tried on' every possible way of being and can see the decision from all angles. What remains consistently clear after this complete sampling is the truth.
lunar_cycle.howItWorks: When a significant decision arises, begin a 28-day waiting period. During this time, the Moon will activate every gate in your design, giving you a complete picture of how the decision feels across all possible configurations. Notice what feels true on day 1 vs day 14 vs day 28. The clarity that emerges consistently across the entire cycle is your answer. Smaller decisions may require shorter cycles, but major life choices demand the full 28 days.
lunar_cycle.strategy: Mark your calendar: 28 days from the decision point. During this time, talk about the decision, feel into it, notice how it shifts as the Moon moves. Keep a journal of your reflections. By day 28, the pattern will be undeniable. You'll know. The lunar cycle removes impulsivity and ensures you've sampled the full spectrum of possibility before committing.
lunar_cycle.signatureWhenCorrect: Surprise (Reflector signature), delight in unexpected clarity, profound wisdom about the decision that surprises even you
lunar_cycle.notSelfWhenIncorrect: Disappointment, premature decisions made without the full cycle, confusion about what you actually want
lunar_cycle.primeInsight: Lunar Cycle Authority is the slowest, most thorough decision-making process in the Energy Blueprint system. In Prime Self, Reflectors are wisdom keepers who demonstrate that truth requires time and complete perspective. Your 28-day cycle is not delay  — it's the minimum time required for your open design to sample all possibilities and arrive at genuine knowing. Your decisions, when correctly timed, carry a weight of wisdom thatis unmatched.
